mapper.insert: insert into excel_document (name, sheet_count, sheet_names, version, status, file_path, file_size, creator_id, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{sheetCount}, #{sheetNames}, #{version}, #{status}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{creatorId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update excel_document
name = #{name},
sheet_count = #{sheetCount},
sheet_names = #{sheetNames},
version = #{version},
status = #{status},
file_path = #{filePath},
file_size = #{fileSize},
creator_id = #{creatorId},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
